hooks.command: python -c "import json, os; data=json.loads(os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT') or '{}'); raw=data.get('file_paths') or data.get('file_path') or []; paths=raw if isinstance(raw, list) else [raw]; hits=[str(p) for p in paths if p and 'docs/requirements/' in str(p).replace(chr(92), '/') and str(p).endswith('.md')]; print('[codd] requirements changed (' + ', '.join(hits) + ') -> run: codd greenfield --resume (resume an autopilot run) or codd check (re-verify coherence)') if hits else None"
